name: dev
description: General-purpose development guards: blocks hardcoded secrets, direct main pushes, destructive SQL migrations, --no-verify bypasses, comment lines in source code, and monitors CI pipeline status after every push. Works with any project.

_meta.notes: Root manifest for Copilot CLI. mcpServers uses type:local + bash -c + XDG_BIN_HOME path (mirrors mcp-rb-resources pattern). Install binary: GOBIN=${XDG_BIN_HOME:-$HOME/.local/bin} go install github.com/e-roux/mcp-git-ops@latest (source: github.com/e-roux/mcp-git-ops, standalone repo). Minimal manifest for Claude Code lives in .claude-plugin/plugin.json.
